title: Kafka - Raw Flows (Live)
description: Live tail of the akvorado 'flows-v5' Kafka topic (inlet -> outlet), decoded as the RawFlow protobuf message. Topic is named 'flows-v5' (base name 'flows' from akvorado.yaml, suffixed with the schema version by the orchestrator), not 'flows'. Payload itself stays opaque undecoded bytes (NetFlow/sFlow/GOB) at this stage; use this to confirm the inlet is producing and to inspect decoder/timestamp metadata, not for traffic content (see ClickHouse dashboards for that).
